## How was this tested?

- [ ] `go build ./...` succeeds
- [ ] `go test ./...` passes

## Checklist

- [ ] Changes are focused — one feature or fix
- [ ] New functionality includes tests
- [ ] Comments explain why, not what
- [ ] No secrets or credentials included
